description: Moccasin style block heels from catwalk. For the women dabbling in edgy fashion, this shoe is the perfect choice. Moccasin styled upper with heels for added oomph. Upper Leather upper with slip-on style features Soft lining and padded sockliner for instep comfort Ruffled stitches at the toe box for style Strap and buckle for style and comfort at the midfoot area Outsole Non-slip TPU outsole with grooves Terraced grooves on the heel for grip Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
